name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support of Rs 6,000 per year in three equal installments to all land holding farmer families.
benefit_description: Direct income support of Rs 6,000 per year paid in 3 installments of Rs 2,000 each directly to bank accounts of farmers.

name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: Health insurance cover of Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit_description: Free health insurance coverage of Rs 5 lakh per family per year covering hospitalization expenses at empaneled hospitals.

name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Financial assistance for construction of pucca house to eligible rural households.
benefit_description: Rs 1.20 lakh in plains and Rs 1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas for construction of houses with basic amenities.

name: PM Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U)
description: Affordable housing for urban poor with interest subsidy on home loans.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit_description: Interest subsidy of 6.5% on housing loans up to Rs 6 lakh for EWS/LIG categories for a tenure of 20 years.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for girl child with high interest rate and tax benefits.
benefit_description: Savings account for girl child below 10 years with 8.2% interest rate. Deposits qualify for tax deduction under Section 80C.

criteria.description: Girl child must be below 10 years

name: PM Mudra Yojana
description: Micro-finance loans up to Rs 10 lakh for non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
benefit_description: Collateral-free loans under 3 categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,000-5 lakh), Tarun (5-10 lakh).

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
description: Maternity benefit of Rs 5,000 for pregnant and lactating mothers for first living child.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit_description: Cash benefit of Rs 5,000 in three installments for first pregnancy to partially compensate for wage loss during childbirth.

name: PM SVANidhi - Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi
description: Micro-credit facility for street vendors affected by COVID-19 to resume their livelihoods.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit_description: Working capital loan of Rs 10,000 (1st), Rs 20,000 (2nd), Rs 50,000 (3rd tranche) with 7% interest subsidy.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Guaranteed minimum pension of Rs 1,000-5,000 per month after age 60 for unorganized sector workers.
benefit_description: Fixed pension of Rs 1,000 to Rs 5,000 per month after age 60 based on contribution. Government co-contributes 50%.

name: PM Garib Kalyan Ann Yojana (PMGKAY)
description: Free food grains to eligible beneficiaries under the National Food Security Act.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution
benefit_description: 5 kg of free food grains (rice/wheat) per person per month to all NFSA beneficiaries.

name: National Scholarship Portal - Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Scholarship for SC students studying at post-matriculation level.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefit_description: Full tuition fee reimbursement and monthly maintenance allowance for SC students in post-matric courses.

name: National Scholarship Portal - Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Scholarship for ST students studying at post-matriculation level.
benefit_description: Full tuition fee reimbursement and monthly maintenance allowance for ST students in post-matric courses.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: Financial assistance for OBC students pursuing post-matriculation education.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefit_description: Scholarship covering tuition fees and maintenance allowance for OBC students in recognized institutions.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Life insurance cover of Rs 2 lakh at premium of Rs 436 per year.
benefit_description: Life insurance coverage of Rs 2 lakh for death due to any reason at annual premium of Rs 436.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accident insurance cover of Rs 2 lakh at premium of Rs 20 per year.
benefit_description: Accidental death and disability coverage at just Rs 20/year. Rs 2 lakh for death, Rs 1 lakh for partial disability.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
description: Free LPG connections to women from BPL households.
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
benefit_description: Free LPG connection with security deposit waiver and free first refill for BPL women.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Bank loans between Rs 10 lakh and Rs 1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs.
benefit_description: Composite loans for setting up greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services, or trading sector.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Free skill development training and certification for Indian youth.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefit_description: Short-term skill training (150-300 hours) with certification. Monetary reward of Rs 8,000 on successful assessment.

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
description: Monthly pension for BPL senior citizens aged 60 and above.
benefit_description: Monthly pension of Rs 200 (age 60-79) and Rs 500 (age 80+) for BPL beneficiaries.

name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension for BPL persons with severe or multiple disabilities aged 18-79.
benefit_description: Monthly pension of Rs 300 for disabled persons with 80%+ disability from BPL families.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Scheme to address declining child sex ratio and promote education of girls.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit_description: Multi-sectoral interventions for survival, protection and education of the girl child.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMSS)
description: Scholarship of Rs 12,000 per annum for meritorious students from economically weaker sections.
benefit_description: Annual scholarship for studying in Class IX to XII in government schools to reduce dropouts.

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: End-to-end support for traditional artisans and craftspeople through training, loans, and certification.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises
benefit_description: Skill training, toolkit incentive of ₹15,000, collateral-free loans up to ₹3 lakh at 5% interest.

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers in case of crop failure.
benefit_description: Insurance coverage for crop loss due to natural calamities at low premium rates (2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi).
